title: ANC - Both modes disabled, turn on ANC, default value selected
scenario: ANC defaults to "On - Adaptive" mode when enabled while both ANC and Transparency modes are disabled; Transparency remains off
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Ensure ANC Mode is set to Off
Ensure Transparency Mode is set to Off
Tap on ANC to turn it On
Observe the ANC mode that is activated
expected: ANC turns on and defaults to "On - Adaptive" mode. Transparency Mode remains disabled (Off).
